original_snippet_context: Discussion of the stability of the exchange market and the provision of letters of credit by the Bank of Brazil.
relevant_quote: Funccionou o mercado sempre com o Banco do Brasil fornecendo letras a 16 15|16 d. e os outros bancos, em geral, a 16 23|32 d., contra letras de café a 16 15|16 e 16 23|32 d. sem abundancia.
justification: This section describes the exchange market operations, including the rates offered by the Bank of Brazil and other banks, without expressing any explicit or implicit opinion about the "Caixa de Conversão" or related monetary policies.
